creator: n4okg@mobis.com
text:
During initial installation, and any other time that "Probing devices" is invoked (running /stand/sysinstall, etc.)the system locks up and the only remedy is the reset button on the machine or the plug in the wall.

Fix: 

In bios configuration on "Plug & Play" options select "Yes".
How-To-Repeat:   See above.
